page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor running at 2.55 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance is configured with 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs with 1.0 thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, and network bandwidth is rated at a baseline of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core results placing in the top 25 percent. Multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and cryptography tests fall within the average range. However, memory performance exhibits a clear tradeoff: while cached small-block read bandwidth is average, large-block uncached read and write memory bandwidth benchmarks are weak, placing in the bottom 25 percent. This bottleneck is also reflected in lower passmark memory and database operation scores.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r7a.2xlarge offers a high-density memory allocation relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-heavy workloads that do not require high-speed local storage or extreme memory write bandwidth. It is well-suited for applications such as Redis caching, static web serving, and moderate text or image processing tasks. It is less optimal for high-throughput database operations or large-scale LLM inference due to memory bandwidth constraints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7T83 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated physical cores running at 2.55 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM, resulting in a high 8.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance does not include local storage and has a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU execution, though uncached large-block memory bandwidth and database operations are relatively weak. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as Redis in-memory caching, static web serving, and moderate text or image processing, where high memory capacity is required but local storage and extreme memory write speeds are not critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance with 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, ideal for in-memory caching and web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps baseline network speed.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores and high memory density for caching and web serving workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 physical cores running at 2.55 GHz
64.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core memory density
Strong single-core CPU performance in benchmark testing
No bundled local storage and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Suited for Redis caching, static web serving, and text processing
